Class AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp<T extends BuiltInRule>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp, RuleApp
Direct Known Subclasses:
BlockContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp, BlockContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp
public abstract class AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp<T extends BuiltInRule> extends AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
Application of AbstractBlockContractRule.
